sourceList.title: GAUTHIER [II] de Brienne, son of ERARD [I] Comte de Brienne & his wife Alix de Montdidier (-before 1161).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Gautier II de Brienne於1095年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，他的父親Comte Erard I de Brienne25歲，母親Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt14歲。他和Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1156年享年61歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gautier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Gautier II de Brienne was born in 1095, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Comte Erard I de Brienne, was 25 and his mother, Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt, was 14. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont. He died in 1156, at the age of 61, and was buried in Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Gautier II de Brienne est né en 1095, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Comte Erard I de Brienne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont. Il est décédé en 1156, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Sicile, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Gautier II de Brienne 1095 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Erard I de Brienne 25 und seine Mutter Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt 14. Er hatte mit Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1156 im Alter von 61 Jahren und wurde in Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Gautier II de Brienne è nato il nel 1095 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Erard I de Brienne, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont. Morì nel 1156, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Sicilia, Italia.

ja.1133/1143: から1133年1月8日まで1144年1月7日

ja.Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Arde: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウ
ja.lifeSummary: Comte Gautier II de Brienneが1095年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Comte Erard I de Brienneは25歳，母Alix de Roucy de Ramerupttは14歳であった。彼はAdélaïde Humbeline de Baudémontとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1156年に61歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Gautier II de Brienne(이)가 1095년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Erard I de Brienne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야에 묻혔다.

lv.1133/1143: no 1133. gada 8. janvāra līdz 1144. gada 7. janvārim

pt.1133/1143: de 8 de janeiro de 1133 a 7 de janeiro de 1144
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Gautier II de Brienne nasceu em 1095, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Comte Erard I de Brienne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont. Ele faleceu em 1156, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Sicilia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Gautier II de Brienne родился в 1095 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Erard I de Brienne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt, 14. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont. Он умер в 1156 г. в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности сисиля, Италия.

sm.1133/1143: mai le 8 Ianuari 1133 e o'o I le 7 Ianuari 1144

es.1133/1143: desde 8 de enero de 1133 hasta 7 de enero de 1144
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Gautier II de Brienne nació en 1095, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Comte Erard I de Brienne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alix de Roucy de Rameruptt, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont. Murió en 1156, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Sicilia, Italia.
